reviews.review_description:
The game is interesting, but far too short. In total, it takes about 20 minutes to explore all the mechanics, features, and scenarios. It would probably take half that time if items didn’t constantly fall through the map and disappear behind textures.

That’s simply too little content to justify the price of a typical VR game with several hours of gameplay.
If you have a gaming pc and a meta quest vr headset just play the game on steam and connect your gaming pc to the headset and use steam vr. The quest version is so buggy.
I love this game, but I have a question can you download mods?

There are some bugs that can make the game pretty much unplayable like the rocks not being able to be delivered in the box which means your stuck with 2 rocks the whole play through and the colours of the game are way off what the pc version looks like overall not like the gameplay you see on YouTube and way to many bugs
for some reason it won't let me kill the fish
If you want to play a game where you servive on a island this game is for you you mostly eat coconut and fish two there is a crab named karl and he's your friend alright I'm done.

Not much you can do it gets super boring so fast
 i just don't think 15 usd is worth it
No updates abandoned don’t buy unless your from 2019

What they have currently is well engineered (for the most part) with solid graphics and fun gameplay. The first con of the is game is the few bugs. Some fish have black/no textures (the flying fish and one other kind) and items sometimes fall through the map (most notably monocles from the skull). It has fun gameplay, and can be challenging, but it has no real progression. The premise is you have to survive and escape from a tiny island, but as of now there is no way to escape. You can get an item that looks like a flare gun from supply drops/care packages but this is purely cosmetic and has for some reason no function or usability. Please add actual progression and a way to escape. I also noticed that the dev attention and updates to this game are a bit lacking seeing as this has been out for a while and still has persistent problems.
Wish meta gave refunds as this is lots of money for this and it is super glitchy

The time fish or whatever comes cooked and Half eaten. My rocks keep falling out of the crate. I feel like you forget we actually pay money to play this game. My personal belief is that we should get what we pay for. And I paid for this. Do not buy this game until it gets fixed by its developers

got this game like 3 years ago and the same glitches are still here...the slow down time fish is the worst and you will starve before anything comes by...also the claw glitches out and i want to be able to craft other stuff..I got so into this game and have been waiting for them to update please.. good tip make two spears hit them together above the wood or whatever you want on fire and boom..you can even cook the fish this way if you run out of wood

reviews.review_title: I love the game but it’s too glitchy
reviews.review_description: I love this game aside from a few glitches. I don't care about the graphics it's still good but the glitches are the reasoning I'm giving it a two star. 1. The flint just flat out falls out of the box as it's coming to shore so cause of glitch 2 I end up dying way too early. I've tried reinstalling it after uninstalling it, uninstalling other things and nothing I've tried has worked so if you have a fix for it add me and please help me fix it. 2. This one isn't as bad but it gets bad because of glitch 1 basically say I'm holding a spear and it just disappears out of thin air it can happen to anything you're holding at that current moment so if you have anything to fix that add me and I'll add you back. I have a suggestion for this game and it's having a little area for a bucket in case you mess up cooking. That's it for my review 2/5 would recommend if I had rocks.
It's not worth $15 it also has a hole bunch of gliches and fish are fully blacked out

So at first it was like the game I saw in videos but, different i just figured it had gotten an update but then things were off. I started to see that some things like the big tentacles didn’t have a texture and we’re just black but then this FREAKED me out! I saw a fish that was entirely black with RED EYES!! Then at that moment I didn’t care about surviving. In conclusion save yourself from getting a big scare don’t get this game, but if you don’t mind that you should get it
